case_title: JERWIN FAJARITO VS. DAVID JOEL SCHERBAK

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-19-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-19-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF JERWIN FAJARITO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DAVID SCHERBAK IS PRESENT.
